{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185325A4E8FF7422EF3F18A2A0"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616164954060456728","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，这个男主我喜欢，虽然有时候有点腹黑，但是不圣母！！！希望作者大大多更点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773280086,"group_id":"7603305765062855704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/IMDsAHMKwVJSiox5Otmfqhsu0geEtP4BoAd/yBbNmB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9c4a458177e44a3884698423558fe884~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792156&x-signature=vM19bt69h1daPCrJ9tf0nC5fuho%3D","user_id":"1704720795185355","user_name":"钬钬-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1704720795185355","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603305765062855704","book_info":{"abstract":"上辈子，沈知砚是华五高校工科博士。
这辈子，穿越到大晟农家。
贫困的家，偏心的奶，木讷的爹和次次落榜的三叔……
在这个万般皆下品惟有读书高的时代，沈知砚挤掉三叔走上科举路！
六岁开蒙。
九岁下场。
沈知砚一路考来，六元及第，高中状元，冠绝天下！
二十岁造出火铳火炮，位极人臣！
文人追捧他的诗词，凡有井水处，皆能歌沈词。
武将痴迷他的武器，凡有烽烟起，尽可见寒芒。
连眼高于顶的长公主，都对其青睐有加！
国库空虚？臣略懂些盐铁之术。
世家嚣张？臣略懂些抄家之道。
外敌来犯？臣略懂些火药之术。
沈知砚以文官之职，拳打党项，脚踢契丹，收复燕云十六州！
旌旗所指，皆为汉土！
群臣颤抖，皇帝流泪。
新皇：爱卿，领土够了，够了……
沈知砚：别急，我再带你们去打一顿小日子。
新皇：呜呜呜，又被首辅大人带飞了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/92389863a48e11a07b19faa97485c1fe","author":"鸡毛呆","author_id":"","book_id":"7603305765062855704","book_name":"科举：状元首辅又带飞朕了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f09888","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603305935062172184","read_count":"19781","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"153346"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"71","tags":"历史古代,历史,架空,科举,穿越,重生,黑科技,争霸,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c35253ab1269611955650b2cae62754~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447205&x-signature=%2FQS%2FtTYgWUCBGj7BxwN5%2Bwkrb8s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_
